Merge pull request #32 from ShubhamMaster/master

Optimize PoolAllocator initialization to O(1) using offset-based allo…

author: shubhammaster
message:
Optimize PoolAllocator initialization to O(1) using offset-based allocation

Previously, the PoolAllocator initialized the entire freeNodeList in Reset() with O(N)
complexity by iterating through all chunks. Before any Free() calls, the allocator
behaved like a LinearAllocator.

This optimization:
- Leaves freeNodeList empty initially (O(1) initialization)
- Adds an m_offset variable to track the current chunk position
- On allocation, checks freeNodeList first for freed chunks
- If freeList is empty, allocates from the pool using offset increment
- Only uses freeNodeList when Free() has been called

Benefits:
- O(1) initialization instead of O(N)
- Same O(1) allocate/free complexity
- No behavioral change for existing code
- Lazy initialization of the free list

author: Adem Budak
message:
Simplify build instructions

Use CMake's `--build` option instead of specify platform specific
build tool name. That way we don't need to add any build generator
name, CMake choose instead of us.
